title: AshVehicle
description: Add-on to add vehicles to Superb Warfare
body:
# AshVehicle

**The ultimate military vehicle expansion for Superb Warfare**

---

## What is AshVehicle?

AshVehicle transforms Superb Warfare into a full-scale military simulation. We've added **50+ meticulously crafted vehicles** — from stealth fighters to main battle tanks, from attack helicopters to guided missiles.

Every vehicle features realistic flight physics, detailed 3D models, and functional weapon systems.

## Requirements

- **Minecraft** 1.20.1
- **Forge** 47.2.0+
- **[Superb Warfare](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/superb-warfare)** (required)
- **[GeckoLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib)** 4.4.6+

---
